hero.title: Explore the world with confidence.
hero.description: Access exclusive deals, manage your itineraries, and discover hidden gems around the globe.

login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey

payments.title: Checkout
payments.subtitle: Secure encryption for your peace of mind
payments.securityNotice: You can edit these mock values for the demo, but the backend receives only the payment token.
payments.tokenHint: Use tokens such as pm_tok_visa_ok, pm_fail_insufficient_funds, or pm_fail_card_declined to reproduce the MVP scenarios.

feedback.readyDescription: Choose a payment scenario to validate the minimum viable behavior of the story.
feedback.successDescription: Receipt {receipt} was generated and the backend requested reservation confirmation.
feedback.failureInsufficient: The card was rejected due to insufficient funds. The traveler can retry with another card.
feedback.failureDeclined: The card was declined. The traveler can retry with another card.
feedback.duplicateDescription: The backend rejected a second immediate attempt for the same operation, preventing an accidental double charge.
feedback.duplicateUnexpectedDescription: The second attempt was not blocked as expected. Review the backend or change the data and retry the test.
feedback.requestErrorDescription: The backend could not complete the payment request.
feedback.timeoutDescription: The request took too long. Verify that the payments backend is running and try again.
feedback.backendUnavailableDescription: The frontend could not reach the payments backend. Verify that it is running on localhost:8002.
feedback.invalidResponseDescription: The frontend received an invalid response from the payments backend.
feedback.eventsUnavailable: The payment was processed, but the frontend could not load the event trail from the backend.

events.title: Payment events
events.caption: This section shows the real event trail returned by the backend for the latest processed payment.
events.empty: There are no events yet. Process a payment or test a duplicate to see them here.

summary.footer: No hidden fees. Free cancellation until Oct 5.
